title: Guanciale Flatbread Pizza
description: A keto pizza made with crispy flatbread, guanciale, and a hint of spicy Syrian seasoning.

ingredients.name: mild cheese (such as goat cheese or feta)

instructions: Cook the guanciale in a skillet over medium heat until crispy.
Cut the flatbread into slices or use as is.
Top each flatbread slice with a few slices of guanciale, some mild cheese, and a sprinkle of Syrian seasoning.
Bake in the oven for 5-7 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and the bread is crispy.
Garnish with fresh parsley and serve hot.
